input.headline: Why footballer Troy Parrott is taking the classic Hero's Journey

raw.headline: Why footballer Troy Parrott is taking the classic Hero's Journey

winner: When Troy Parrott embarks on his hero's journey, they'll soon realize he's no Odysseus... he just can't seem to escape offside!

candidates.text: Why did Troy Parrot bring a map on the soccer field? He heard he had to cross the River Clyne and slay the Greenock Morton dragons!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative use of fantasy elements with specific football references, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why is Troy Parrott currently searching for his lost cleats at the bottom of a cave? Because he took the classic Hero's Journey... to the Underfoot World!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist on the Hero's Journey with a football-related pun, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Troy Parrot now embarking on a hero's journey? Well, he better get used to being chased by defenders instead of dragons!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the Hero's Journey with a football-specific reference, concise and clever."}

candidates.text: When Troy Parrott embarks on his hero's journey, they'll soon realize he's no Odysseus... he just can't seem to escape offside!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay on 'offside' and the Hero's Journey, concise and specific to football context."}

candidates.text: Troy Parrott has entered the dark forest, but he seems to be struggling with foraging and direction - perhaps he needs a better guidebook for his Hero's Journey.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and ties to the headline, but the humor is mild and lacks a strong punchline or surprising twist."}
